overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player moves from a covered sidewalk under an overpass, through neon-lit streets with pedestrians carrying umbrellas, into an open plaza with palm trees and large digital billboards, and finally along an elevated walkway overlooking a lower garden level. The scene is characterized by heavy rain, reflective wet surfaces, and pervasive neon lighting in blues, pinks, and yellows.

events.description: pedestrians with umbrellas cross the path ahead
slight turn to avoid pedestrian with glowing blue umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk under the overpass, navigating past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking with a glowing blue umbrella, moving toward the camera
standing near a food stall, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large concrete overpass covering the street, creating a sheltered walkway
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing, wet and reflective from rain
tall buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and digital signage
metal roll-down shutters on storefronts with graffiti and posters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked urban sidewalk beneath a massive overpass. The camera moves forward past a yellow-striped crosswalk, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk toward the camera, including one with a distinctive glowing blue umbrella. The environment is sheltered from the rain but wet, with closed shop shutters lining the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional sidewalk leading to open plaza

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into a more open street with visible sky
passing a food vendor cart with umbrella on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing food vendors and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing under a large umbrella next to a cart

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the edge of the approaching plaza
large orange neon sign reading 'CALIENTE' on a building facade
street food vendor cart with umbrella and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered overpass into a more open area with visible sky and palm trees. The 'CALIENTE' neon sign becomes visible on the left as the camera approaches a plaza entrance. A food vendor cart with an umbrella appears on the right. The crowd density increases slightly with pedestrians walking in various directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with neon signage and palm trees

events.description: entering the open plaza area with the CALIENTE sign now prominent on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing between palm trees and neon signs

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking away from the camera toward the plaza center

entered.detail: massive curved digital billboards displaying advertisements on building facades
concrete seating areas with people resting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a wide-open plaza dominated by the bright orange 'CALIENTE' neon sign on the left. Palm trees are scattered throughout the space, and massive digital billboards cover the buildings ahead. The ground is paved with large tiles, and the area is fully exposed to the rainy night sky. Pedestrians are sparse, walking in various directions across the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking lower garden level

events.description: ascending to an elevated walkway with glass floor sections overlooking a lower level
passing under intense blue and yellow neon strip lighting along the building edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, looking down at the lower garden level through glass panels

entered.detail: metal and glass railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
lower level visible through glass floor, containing tropical plants and vegetation
building facade with prominent blue and yellow neon strip lighting along the roofline
transparent glass panels in the walkway floor showing the level below

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions onto an elevated walkway with glass floor sections revealing a lower garden level with tropical plants below. The walkway is lined with railings and passes alongside a building with striking blue and yellow neon trim. The environment becomes more sheltered and enclosed compared to the open plaza, with the neon lighting creating intense colored reflections on the wet surfaces.

events.description: slight turn to the right as the walkway curves toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated walkway, approaching a building entrance with neon lighting

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing standing near the building wall

entered.detail: large entrance to the building with glass doors and surrounding neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the elevated walkway, which curves slightly toward a building entrance. The building with blue and yellow neon trim is now prominent on the left side, very close to the camera. The lower garden level is no longer visible as the walkway continues. A pedestrian in red stands near the building wall on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance approach with neon-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the building entrance, moving into a more enclosed neon-lit corridor

entered.detail: intense blue and orange neon lighting lining the final approach to the entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the building entrance along a narrow, neon-lit corridor. The space becomes more enclosed with the building facade dominating the view. The blue and yellow neon trim creates intense reflections on the wet pavement as the camera moves toward the entrance, with the open plaza and palm trees now behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a wide, rain-drenched neon plaza. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, gliding past a yellow-striped crosswalk and pedestrians with glowing umbrellas while closed shop shutters line the path. As the camera exits the covered area, the environment opens up to the rainy night sky, passing a food vendor cart and the first glimpse of a Caliente neon sign. The scene then expands into a vast, tiled plaza where palm trees are scattered beneath towering digital billboards and the bright orange glow of the Caliente sign dominates the left side. Finally, the camera moves across the open, reflective pavement as the surrounding architecture shifts from dense street-level shops to massive, light-emitting skyscrapers.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated walkway that transitions from an open view of a lower garden into a narrow, enclosed building entrance. It begins on a glass-floored path revealing tropical plants below, moving alongside a structure accented with striking blue and yellow neon trim. As the walkway curves, the garden level disappears from view and the camera draws closer to the building's facade, passing a pedestrian dressed in red. The scene then shifts into a more confined, neon-lit corridor where the open plaza and palm trees fade into the background. Finally, the camera approaches the building entrance, with the intense blue and yellow lights creating vivid reflections on the wet pavement.
